top_insights: Waiting for rescue is the fastest way to stay poor.
True wealth isn't a number; it's the silence of no debt.
Your story is your only leverage in a noisy world.
The smartest people ignore degrees and master the craft.
Never trash your partner publicly; it destroys your own brand.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common assumptions or norms
Insight-driven declarations offering a 'secret' or specific perspective
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique experience
angles: Deconstructing the 'rescue' mentality and emphasizing individual responsibility
Revealing the hidden habits or rules behind high-level success and wealth
Using personal stories to illustrate counter-intuitive truths about relationships or career
emotional_drivers: Validation (seeking confirmation of one's worldview or status)
Aspiration (desire for wealth, success, or self-improvement)
Security (finding comfort in clear rules, boundaries, or self-reliance)
emerging_narrative: A shift toward radical self-reliance and the rejection of external validation or rescue, coupled with a fascination for the mechanics of wealth creation and the strategic use of personal narrative to influence outcomes.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common assumptions or norms
Insight-driven declarations offering a 'secret' or specific perspective
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique experience
